meta.name: template-generate-and-filter
meta.description: TEMPLATE (pattern): generate many candidates cheaply, score each independently, keep the best. Rename meta.name, then replace every <placeholder>.
meta.whenToUse: When volume + a filter beats careful single-shot generation — names, test cases, hypotheses, ideas

args.brief: string (required) — <what to generate and the constraints>

steps.does: generate <20+> diverse candidates for {brief}; favor variety over polish

body.does: score {candidate} against {brief} on <the criteria that matter>; be harsh

steps.does: rank {candidates} by {scores} and keep the top <N> with a one-line case for each

end.review: <e.g. a shortlist of N, each with a score and rationale>
